title.zh: OpenODC 中国道路规则义务映射

description.zh: 把现行公开法规中的道路规则义务连接到 ODC 适用条件、场景触发点和候选证据。
description.en: Connects road-rule obligations from current public sources to ODC applicability, scenario triggers, and evidence candidates.

disclaimer.zh: 本数据用于工程研究、需求追溯和测试设计，不构成法律意见、认证结论或任何车型的符合性判定。
disclaimer.en: This dataset supports engineering research, requirements traceability, and test design. It is not legal advice, certification, or a compliance determination for any vehicle.

title.zh: 《中华人民共和国道路交通安全法》（2021年修正）
title.en: Road Traffic Safety Law of the People’s Republic of China (2021 revision)

authority.zh: 全国人民代表大会常务委员会
authority.en: Standing Committee of the National People’s Congress

official_repository.en: National Database of Laws and Regulations

fingerprint_scope.zh: 对官方公开记录的标识、题名、发布主体、版本、URL 和核验日期生成元数据指纹；不是网页正文副本。
fingerprint_scope.en: Metadata fingerprint over the official record ID, title, authority, version, URL, and review date; it is not a copy of the webpage body.

title.zh: 《中华人民共和国道路交通安全法实施条例》（2017年修订）
title.en: Regulation on the Implementation of the Road Traffic Safety Law (2017 revision)

authority.en: State Council of the People’s Republic of China

fingerprint_scope.zh: 对官方公开记录的标识、题名、发布主体、版本、URL 和核验日期生成元数据指纹；不是网页正文副本。
fingerprint_scope.en: Metadata fingerprint over the official record ID, title, authority, version, URL, and review date; it is not a copy of the webpage body.

title.zh: GB 5768《道路交通标志和标线》现行系列
title.en: Current GB 5768 series: Road Traffic Signs and Markings

authority.zh: 国家标准化管理委员会

official_repository.zh: 全国标准信息公共服务平台
official_repository.en: National Public Service Platform for Standards Information

fingerprint_scope.zh: 对官方公开记录的标识、题名、发布主体、版本、URL 和核验日期生成元数据指纹；不是网页正文副本。
fingerprint_scope.en: Metadata fingerprint over the official record ID, title, authority, version, URL, and review date; it is not a copy of the webpage body.

title.zh: GB/T 45312-2025《智能网联汽车 自动驾驶系统设计运行条件》
title.en: GB/T 45312-2025 Operational design condition for automated driving system

authority.zh: 国家标准化管理委员会

official_repository.zh: 全国标准信息公共服务平台
official_repository.en: National Public Service Platform for Standards Information

fingerprint_scope.zh: 对官方公开记录的标识、题名、发布主体、版本、URL 和核验日期生成元数据指纹；不是网页正文副本。
fingerprint_scope.en: Metadata fingerprint over the official record ID, title, authority, version, URL, and review date; it is not a copy of the webpage body.

title.zh: 服从交通警察指挥

normative_rule.zh: 车辆和行人应按交通信号通行，遇现场指挥时按交通警察指挥通行。
normative_rule.en: Road users follow traffic signals and on-site police directions.

label.zh: 车辆和行人等道路交通参与者
label.en: Vehicles, pedestrians, and other road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 现场交通警察指挥优先于其他交通信号；系统必须识别不能可靠处理的指挥并进入受控响应。
summary.en: On-site police directions take precedence over other traffic signals; the system must detect unsupported directions and enter a controlled response.

statement.zh: 服从现场指挥是公开规则；识别置信度不足时的减速和最小风险处置是 OpenODC 提出的工程候选，不是条文直接规定的 ADS 行为。
statement.en: Following on-site directions is the public rule. Slowing and minimum-risk handling under uncertain recognition are OpenODC engineering candidates, not ADS behavior directly prescribed by the clause.

interpretation.zh: 车辆和行人应按交通信号通行，遇现场指挥时按交通警察指挥通行。
interpretation.en: Road users follow traffic signals and on-site police directions.

rationale.zh: OpenODC 目前仅有交通控制设施上位类，尚未独立建模警察手势。
rationale.en: OpenODC currently has only the traffic-control parent class and does not model police gestures separately.

rationale.zh: 交通警察首先表现为需要感知、分类和跟踪的人员目标。
rationale.en: A traffic officer is also a human target that must be perceived, classified, and tracked.

condition.zh: 存在现场交通警察，或固定信号与现场指挥发生冲突。
condition.en: An on-site traffic officer is present, or the direction conflicts with fixed signals.

trigger.zh: 警察给出停止、转弯、变道或靠边指挥。
trigger.en: An officer gives a stop, turn, lane-change, or pull-over direction.

expected_response.zh: 优先服从可确认的指挥；无法可靠解释时减速、保持安全间距并进入最小风险处置。
expected_response.en: Follow confirmed directions; if interpretation is unreliable, slow down, preserve clearance, and enter a minimum-risk response.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 遵守交通信号灯与停止线
title.en: Obey traffic lights and stop lines

normative_rule.zh: 交通信号灯属于统一交通信号，车辆应按信号通行。
normative_rule.en: Traffic lights are part of the unified signal system and road users must obey them.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 依据灯色、方向指示、车道信号和停止线确定通行、停车与转向行为。
summary.en: Use signal color, directional indications, lane signals, and stop lines to determine movement, stopping, and turning.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 交通信号灯属于统一交通信号，车辆应按信号通行。
interpretation.en: Traffic lights are part of the unified signal system and road users must obey them.

clauses: 第三十八条至第四十三条

interpretation.zh: 实施条例细化机动车、行人、车道、闪光警告及铁路道口信号。
interpretation.en: The regulation details vehicle, pedestrian, lane, warning-flash, and railway-crossing signals.

rationale.zh: 交通信号灯是直接 ODC 环境要素。
rationale.en: Traffic signals are a direct ODC environment element.

rationale.zh: 停止线和导向线的类型影响信号行为解释。
rationale.en: Stop-line and guide-marking types affect signal interpretation.

condition.zh: 道路设置机动车、车道、方向、人行横道或闪光警告信号灯。
condition.en: Vehicle, lane, directional, pedestrian, or warning-flash signals are present.

trigger.zh: 信号发生绿黄红转换，或停止线被遮挡、磨损。
trigger.en: The signal changes state, or the stop line is obscured or worn.

expected_response.zh: 按可确认信号和停止线约束行驶；对冲突或低置信度信号采取保守处置。
expected_response.en: Drive within confirmed signal and stop-line constraints; resolve conflicts or low confidence conservatively.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 遵守道路交通标志

normative_rule.zh: 交通标志属于交通信号，车辆和行人应按其通行。
normative_rule.en: Road signs are traffic signals and must be followed.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 识别并执行禁令、指示、警告及临时交通标志所表达的道路规则。
summary.en: Recognize and follow prohibitory, mandatory, warning, and temporary road signs.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 交通标志属于交通信号，车辆和行人应按其通行。
interpretation.en: Road signs are traffic signals and must be followed.

interpretation.zh: 现行国家标准规定道路交通标志的一般和具体表达。
interpretation.en: Current national standards define general and specific road-sign expressions.

rationale.zh: 道路交通标志与 OpenODC 标志要素直接对应。
rationale.en: Road signs map directly to the OpenODC sign element.

condition.zh: ODC 内存在固定、可变或临时交通标志。
condition.en: Fixed, variable, or temporary signs exist within the ODC.

trigger.zh: 出现限速、禁行、让行、施工或车道用途标志。
trigger.en: A speed, prohibition, yield, work-zone, or lane-use sign appears.

expected_response.zh: 将标志约束纳入路径、速度和动作决策，并保留识别证据。
expected_response.en: Apply the sign constraint to route, speed, and maneuver decisions and retain recognition evidence.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 遵守道路交通标线

normative_rule.zh: 交通标线属于交通信号，车辆和行人应按其通行。
normative_rule.en: Road markings are traffic signals and must be followed.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 依据标线类型、颜色和质量约束车道保持、变道、停车和转向。
summary.en: Use marking type, color, and quality to constrain lane keeping, lane changes, stopping, and turning.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 交通标线属于交通信号，车辆和行人应按其通行。
interpretation.en: Road markings are traffic signals and must be followed.

interpretation.zh: 现行国家标准规定道路交通标线的一般和具体表达。
interpretation.en: Current national standards define general and specific road-marking expressions.

rationale.zh: 标线类型直接决定跨越和行驶约束。
rationale.en: Marking type directly constrains crossing and travel.

rationale.zh: 标线颜色承载车道边界和临时规则语义。
rationale.en: Marking color carries lane-boundary and temporary-rule semantics.

rationale.zh: 标线质量影响可感知性与规则判读置信度。
rationale.en: Marking quality affects perception and interpretation confidence.

condition.zh: 车道边界、导向、停止或禁停等标线存在。
condition.en: Lane-boundary, guide, stop, or no-stopping markings are present.

trigger.zh: 实虚线变化、标线磨损、临时标线与永久标线冲突。
trigger.en: Solid/dashed patterns change, markings are worn, or temporary and permanent markings conflict.

expected_response.zh: 优先采用可确认且具有当前交通效力的标线；无法判定时禁止激进行为。
expected_response.en: Use the confirmed currently effective marking; avoid aggressive maneuvers when uncertain.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 右侧通行与分道行驶
title.en: Keep right and use designated lanes

normative_rule.zh: 规定右侧通行、分道通行、专用车道和非机动车通行位置。
normative_rule.en: Defines right-side traffic, lane separation, reserved lanes, and non-motorized positioning.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 按照道路划分在机动车道内通行，并处理无分道、混行与特殊车道结构。
summary.en: Travel in designated motor-vehicle lanes and handle undivided, mixed-traffic, and special lane layouts.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

clauses: 第三十五条至第三十七条

interpretation.zh: 规定右侧通行、分道通行、专用车道和非机动车通行位置。
interpretation.en: Defines right-side traffic, lane separation, reserved lanes, and non-motorized positioning.

rationale.zh: 机动车道直接限定机动车通行空间。
rationale.en: Motor-vehicle lanes directly define travel space.

rationale.zh: 非机动车道影响分道和交互边界。
rationale.en: Non-motorized lanes affect separation and interactions.

rationale.zh: 混行车道需要更强的交互约束。
rationale.en: Mixed lanes require stronger interaction constraints.

condition.zh: 存在分道、无分道或机非混行道路。
condition.en: The road is divided, undivided, or mixed with non-motorized traffic.

trigger.zh: 车道类型改变、道路变窄或非机动车道被占用。
trigger.en: Lane type changes, the road narrows, or a non-motorized lane is obstructed.

expected_response.zh: 保持合法通行位置，对临时借道和混行参与者实施减速与间距控制。
expected_response.en: Maintain a lawful lane position and control speed and clearance for temporary lane borrowing and mixed traffic.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 遵守限速并保持安全车速
title.en: Observe speed limits and maintain a safe speed

normative_rule.zh: 不得超过限速标志速度；危险路段、夜间和恶劣天气应降低速度。
normative_rule.en: Do not exceed posted limits and reduce speed at night, on hazardous roads, and in adverse weather.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 同时满足标志标线限速、道路结构、天气能见度和风险条件下的安全速度要求。
summary.en: Satisfy posted limits and adapt speed to road geometry, weather, visibility, and risk conditions.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 不得超过限速标志速度；危险路段、夜间和恶劣天气应降低速度。
interpretation.en: Do not exceed posted limits and reduce speed at night, on hazardous roads, and in adverse weather.

interpretation.zh: 细化普通道路、高速公路和低能见度条件下速度阈值。
interpretation.en: Details speed thresholds on ordinary roads, expressways, and under low visibility.

interpretation.zh: 现行标准规定限制速度标志和设置语义。
interpretation.en: The current standard defines speed-limit signs and their semantics.

rationale.zh: 运行速度是规则执行和证据记录的核心车辆状态。
rationale.en: Operating speed is the core vehicle state for execution and evidence.

rationale.zh: 雾和能见度影响安全速度。
rationale.en: Fog and visibility affect safe speed.

rationale.zh: 弯道等几何特征影响安全速度选择。
rationale.en: Curves and other geometry affect safe-speed selection.

condition.zh: 存在限速、低能见度、弯坡或其他需要降速的风险条件。
condition.en: A speed limit, low visibility, curve/grade, or another speed-reduction condition exists.

trigger.zh: 限速变化，或天气和道路条件使当前速度不再安全。
trigger.en: The limit changes, or weather and road conditions make the current speed unsafe.

expected_response.zh: 在约束生效前平顺降速，并持续记录限速来源、目标速度和实际速度。
expected_response.en: Reduce speed smoothly before the constraint applies and log source, target, and actual speed.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 遵守专用车道与应急车道规则

normative_rule.zh: 专用车道只准规定车辆通行。
normative_rule.en: Reserved lanes are limited to designated vehicles.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 根据车道用途、时段和交通控制决定专用、潮汐、避险及应急车道是否可用。
summary.en: Use lane purpose, time, and traffic control to determine access to reserved, reversible, escape, and emergency lanes.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 专用车道只准规定车辆通行。
interpretation.en: Reserved lanes are limited to designated vehicles.

interpretation.zh: 非紧急情况不得在高速公路应急车道行驶或停车。
interpretation.en: Expressway emergency lanes cannot be used or stopped in except for emergencies.

rationale.zh: 公交专用车道是明确的 ODC 车道类型。
rationale.en: Bus lanes are an explicit ODC lane type.

rationale.zh: 潮汐车道具有时变方向和准入条件。
rationale.en: Reversible lanes have time-varying direction and access.

rationale.zh: 避险车道只用于特定风险处置。
rationale.en: Escape lanes are for specific risk handling.

rationale.zh: 应急车道具有严格准入边界。
rationale.en: Emergency lanes have strict access boundaries.

condition.zh: 道路存在专用、潮汐、避险或应急车道。
condition.en: Reserved, reversible, escape, or emergency lanes are present.

trigger.zh: 车道用途标志、信号或开放时段变化。
trigger.en: Lane-use signs, signals, or opening periods change.

expected_response.zh: 只在明确授权或紧急处置条件成立时进入，并保存准入依据。
expected_response.en: Enter only when explicitly authorized or under a valid emergency condition, retaining the basis for access.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 安全通过铁路道口

normative_rule.zh: 铁路道口应设置警示，机动车按信号或管理指挥通行。
normative_rule.en: Railway crossings require warnings and vehicles follow signals or personnel.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 服从道口信号和管理人员指挥；无信号时减速或停车确认安全。
summary.en: Follow crossing signals and personnel; slow or stop to confirm safety where no signal exists.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 铁路道口应设置警示，机动车按信号或管理指挥通行。
interpretation.en: Railway crossings require warnings and vehicles follow signals or personnel.

interpretation.zh: 规定铁路道口红灯信号语义。
interpretation.en: Defines red-signal semantics at railway crossings.

interpretation.zh: 现行标准规定铁路道口交通标志和标线。
interpretation.en: The current standard defines railway-crossing signs and markings.

rationale.zh: 铁路交叉设施与规则场景直接对应。
rationale.en: Railway-crossing facilities map directly to the rule scenario.

rationale.zh: 道口信号决定通行许可。
rationale.en: Crossing signals determine permission to proceed.

condition.zh: 路线穿越有人或无人看守铁路道口。
condition.en: The route crosses a guarded or unguarded railway crossing.

trigger.zh: 道口灯闪烁、栏杆关闭、人员指挥或视距受限。
trigger.en: Crossing lights flash, barriers close, personnel direct traffic, or sight distance is limited.

expected_response.zh: 在道口外停车或减速确认，不在轨道区域内停留。
expected_response.en: Stop or slow before the crossing, confirm safety, and never remain in the track zone.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 保持安全跟车距离

normative_rule.zh: 后车应与前车保持足以采取紧急制动的安全距离。
normative_rule.en: A following vehicle must retain enough distance for emergency braking.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 根据速度、路面、天气、能见度和前车运动保持足以制动的距离。
summary.en: Maintain enough braking distance based on speed, surface, weather, visibility, and lead-vehicle motion.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 后车应与前车保持足以采取紧急制动的安全距离。
interpretation.en: A following vehicle must retain enough distance for emergency braking.

interpretation.zh: 细化高速公路跟车距离及低能见度阈值。
interpretation.en: Details expressway following distance and low-visibility thresholds.

rationale.zh: 前车属于核心交互目标。
rationale.en: The lead vehicle is a core interaction target.

rationale.zh: 速度是安全距离计算的关键输入。
rationale.en: Speed is a key input to safe-distance calculation.

condition.zh: 同车道存在前车或汇入车辆。
condition.en: A lead or merging vehicle is present in the lane.

trigger.zh: 时距下降、前车制动或路面附着和能见度恶化。
trigger.en: Time headway drops, the lead vehicle brakes, or friction/visibility deteriorates.

expected_response.zh: 提前减速并恢复可验证的安全时距，不以碰撞避免作为唯一通过标准。
expected_response.en: Decelerate early and restore a verifiable safe headway; collision avoidance alone is not the only pass criterion.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 安全变更车道

normative_rule.zh: 变更车道不得影响相关车道内机动车正常行驶。
normative_rule.en: A lane change must not affect normal travel in the target lane.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 确认目标车道间隙、优先关系和标线约束，不影响相关车道正常行驶。
summary.en: Confirm target-lane gaps, priority, and marking constraints without disrupting traffic in the target lane.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 变更车道不得影响相关车道内机动车正常行驶。
interpretation.en: A lane change must not affect normal travel in the target lane.

rationale.zh: 入口和加速车道形成典型汇入变道。
rationale.en: Entrances and acceleration lanes create merge lane changes.

rationale.zh: 出口和减速车道形成典型分流变道。
rationale.en: Exits and deceleration lanes create diverge lane changes.

rationale.zh: 实虚线决定是否允许跨越。
rationale.en: Solid/dashed markings determine whether crossing is allowed.

condition.zh: 存在可变更的相邻车道、入口或出口。
condition.en: An adjacent lane, entrance, or exit is available for a lane change.

trigger.zh: 导航、障碍、车道结束或交通组织要求变道。
trigger.en: Navigation, an obstruction, a lane ending, or traffic organization requires a lane change.

expected_response.zh: 检查标线与间隙，发出信号，平顺完成或在条件不足时取消。
expected_response.en: Check markings and gaps, signal, and execute smoothly or abort when conditions are insufficient.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 合法且安全地超车

normative_rule.zh: 规定安全距离及不得超车的前车状态、特殊车辆和道路位置。
normative_rule.en: Defines safe distance and conditions where overtaking is prohibited.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 只在允许路段、足够视距与安全间隙下超车，并避开明令禁止的道路结构和对象。
summary.en: Overtake only on permitted roads with sufficient sight distance and gaps, avoiding prohibited structures and targets.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 规定安全距离及不得超车的前车状态、特殊车辆和道路位置。
interpretation.en: Defines safe distance and conditions where overtaking is prohibited.

interpretation.zh: 规定超车信号、方向和安全间距。
interpretation.en: Defines overtaking signals, direction, and clearance.

rationale.zh: 被超车辆和对向车辆构成关键交互对象。
rationale.en: The overtaken and oncoming vehicles are key interaction targets.

rationale.zh: 弯道视距影响超车适用性。
rationale.en: Curve sight distance affects overtaking applicability.

rationale.zh: 隧道属于法规列举的无超车条件位置。
rationale.en: Tunnels are listed as locations without overtaking conditions.

condition.zh: 存在慢车且道路、标线、视距和对向间隙均允许超车。
condition.en: A slower vehicle is present and road, markings, sight distance, and oncoming gap permit overtaking.

trigger.zh: 前车减速，或道路进入弯道、窄桥、隧道、交叉口等禁超区域。
trigger.en: The lead vehicle slows, or the road enters a prohibited curve, narrow bridge, tunnel, or intersection.

expected_response.zh: 仅在完整安全窗口内执行；窗口关闭即取消，不强行完成。
expected_response.en: Execute only within a complete safe window; abort rather than force completion when it closes.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 安全转弯与掉头

normative_rule.zh: 规定掉头、倒车以及有无信号交叉口的转弯和让行行为。
normative_rule.en: Defines U-turns, reversing, and turning/priority at controlled and uncontrolled intersections.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 依据导向车道、信号、标线、让行关系和道路结构完成转弯或掉头。
summary.en: Use guide lanes, signals, markings, priority, and road structure to execute turns or U-turns.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

clauses: 第四十九条至第五十二条

interpretation.zh: 规定掉头、倒车以及有无信号交叉口的转弯和让行行为。
interpretation.en: Defines U-turns, reversing, and turning/priority at controlled and uncontrolled intersections.

rationale.zh: 平面交叉是转向行为的主要结构。
rationale.en: At-grade intersections are the primary structure for turning.

rationale.zh: 环岛需要进入、环行和驶出决策。
rationale.en: Roundabouts require entry, circulation, and exit decisions.

rationale.zh: 匝道转向涉及曲率、速度和汇入关系。
rationale.en: Ramp turns involve curvature, speed, and merging.

condition.zh: 路线要求左转、右转、掉头或环岛通行。
condition.en: The route requires a left turn, right turn, U-turn, or roundabout traversal.

trigger.zh: 到达导向车道、停止线、冲突点或允许掉头位置。
trigger.en: The vehicle reaches a guide lane, stop line, conflict point, or permitted U-turn point.

expected_response.zh: 提前选道和示意，遵守禁止性约束并让行冲突交通。
expected_response.en: Select the lane and signal early, obey prohibitions, and yield to conflicting traffic.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 遵守交叉口优先关系

normative_rule.zh: 交叉口按信号通行；无信号时减速并让行人和优先车辆先行。
normative_rule.en: Follow signals at intersections; otherwise slow and yield to pedestrians and priority traffic.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 在有信号和无信号交叉口识别优先通行方，并对行人和冲突车辆让行。
summary.en: Identify priority at controlled and uncontrolled intersections and yield to pedestrians and conflicting vehicles.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 交叉口按信号通行；无信号时减速并让行人和优先车辆先行。
interpretation.en: Follow signals at intersections; otherwise slow and yield to pedestrians and priority traffic.

interpretation.zh: 细化环岛、左右转和无控制交叉口的优先关系。
interpretation.en: Details roundabout, turning, and uncontrolled-intersection priority.

rationale.zh: 平面交叉定义冲突空间。
rationale.en: At-grade intersections define the conflict space.

rationale.zh: 信号状态决定通行权。
rationale.en: Signal state determines right of way.

rationale.zh: 人行横道引入行人优先约束。
rationale.en: Crosswalks introduce pedestrian-priority constraints.

condition.zh: 进入有信号或无信号的交叉口。
condition.en: The vehicle approaches a controlled or uncontrolled intersection.

trigger.zh: 检测到冲突车辆、行人、放行信号或右侧来车。
trigger.en: Conflicting vehicles, pedestrians, a release signal, or right-side traffic are detected.

expected_response.zh: 建立冲突区通行序列，只在优先关系和安全间隙均明确时进入。
expected_response.en: Establish a conflict-zone sequence and enter only when priority and safe gap are clear.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 排队通行与交替汇入

normative_rule.zh: 排队缓行时不得穿插；车道减少或无控制路口应依次交替通行。
normative_rule.en: Do not cut into queues; alternate at lane reductions or uncontrolled junctions.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 拥堵或车道减少时不穿插、不借道抢行，并按规则依次或交替通行。
summary.en: In congestion or lane reductions, do not cut in or use opposing lanes; proceed in order or alternate merges.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 排队缓行时不得穿插；车道减少或无控制路口应依次交替通行。
interpretation.en: Do not cut into queues; alternate at lane reductions or uncontrolled junctions.

rationale.zh: 入口形成汇入和排队交互。
rationale.en: Entrances create merging and queuing interactions.

rationale.zh: 车道数量减少是交替通行的适用条件。
rationale.en: Lane-count reduction is an applicability condition for alternating merge.

rationale.zh: 施工常造成临时车道减少。
rationale.en: Work zones often cause temporary lane reductions.

condition.zh: 拥堵、车道减少或施工导改形成排队汇入。
condition.en: Congestion, lane reduction, or work-zone diversion creates a queued merge.

trigger.zh: 相邻车辆在汇入点竞争同一通行空间。
trigger.en: Adjacent vehicles compete for the same space at a merge point.

expected_response.zh: 保持队列秩序和可解释的交替策略，不以迫使他车制动换取通行。
expected_response.en: Maintain queue order and an explainable alternating strategy without forcing another vehicle to brake.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 在人行横道和横穿场景让行
title.en: Yield at crosswalks and pedestrian crossings

normative_rule.zh: 规定机动车在人行横道和无信号横穿场景的减速、停车和避让义务。
normative_rule.en: Defines slowing, stopping, and yielding duties at crosswalks and unsignalized crossings.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 接近人行横道减速，对正在通过或横穿道路的行人停车或避让。
summary.en: Slow near crosswalks and stop or yield to pedestrians crossing or entering the road.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

clauses: 第六十一条至第六十四条

interpretation.zh: 规定机动车在人行横道和无信号横穿场景的减速、停车和避让义务。
interpretation.en: Defines slowing, stopping, and yielding duties at crosswalks and unsignalized crossings.

interpretation.zh: 细化行人横过机动车道的通行行为。
interpretation.en: Details pedestrian road-crossing behavior.

rationale.zh: 行人是直接交通参与者要素。
rationale.en: Pedestrians are a direct traffic-participant element.

rationale.zh: 人行横道是直接道路设施要素。
rationale.en: Crosswalks are a direct road-facility element.

condition.zh: 人行横道、路口或无设施路段出现行人横穿意图。
condition.en: A pedestrian intends to cross at a crosswalk, junction, or road section without a facility.

trigger.zh: 行人进入路缘、横道或预计冲突区域。
trigger.en: A pedestrian enters the curb, crosswalk, or predicted conflict zone.

expected_response.zh: 提前减速并建立停车能力，对脆弱或不确定行为保留更大安全裕度。
expected_response.en: Slow early and preserve stopping capability, with larger margins for vulnerable or uncertain behavior.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 处理非机动车与混合交通

normative_rule.zh: 规定非机动车通行位置和部分速度要求。
normative_rule.en: Defines non-motorized travel position and selected speed requirements.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 识别非机动车合法通行空间、临时借道和交叉口优先关系。
summary.en: Recognize lawful non-motorized travel space, temporary lane borrowing, and intersection priority.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 规定非机动车通行位置和部分速度要求。
interpretation.en: Defines non-motorized travel position and selected speed requirements.

clauses: 第六十八条至第七十条

interpretation.zh: 细化非机动车交叉口、横穿和车道受阻时的行为及机动车让行。
interpretation.en: Details non-motorized intersection, crossing, and blocked-lane behavior and motor-vehicle yielding.

rationale.zh: 非机动车是直接交通参与者要素。
rationale.en: Non-motorized vehicles are a direct participant element.

rationale.zh: 非机动车道定义正常通行空间。
rationale.en: Non-motorized lanes define normal travel space.

rationale.zh: 机非混行提高横向交互复杂度。
rationale.en: Mixed lanes increase lateral-interaction complexity.

condition.zh: 存在自行车、电动自行车或其他非机动车及其通行空间。
condition.en: Bicycles, e-bikes, or other non-motorized users and their travel space are present.

trigger.zh: 非机动车汇入、横穿、绕障或临时借用机动车道。
trigger.en: A non-motorized user merges, crosses, avoids an obstacle, or temporarily uses a motor lane.

expected_response.zh: 降低相对速度、扩大横向间距并保留可预测的让行空间。
expected_response.en: Reduce relative speed, increase lateral clearance, and preserve predictable yielding space.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 避让执行紧急任务的车辆

normative_rule.zh: 执行紧急任务的特种车辆享有优先通行，其他车辆和行人应当让行。
normative_rule.en: Emergency vehicles on active duty have priority and other road users must yield.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 识别警报器、标志灯具和紧急任务车辆，及时创造安全通行空间。
summary.en: Recognize sirens, warning lights, and emergency vehicles and create safe passage promptly.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 执行紧急任务的特种车辆享有优先通行，其他车辆和行人应当让行。
interpretation.en: Emergency vehicles on active duty have priority and other road users must yield.

rationale.zh: 现有目录以机动车上位类承载紧急车辆，后续可扩展子类型。
rationale.en: The current catalog represents emergency vehicles under the motor-vehicle parent class and can later add subtypes.

rationale.zh: 标志灯具是识别紧急状态的视觉线索之一。
rationale.en: Warning lights are a visual cue for emergency status.

condition.zh: 警车、消防车、救护车或工程救险车执行紧急任务。
condition.en: Police, fire, ambulance, or rescue vehicles are performing an emergency task.

trigger.zh: 检测到接近的警报器、标志灯或紧急车辆轨迹。
trigger.en: An approaching siren, warning light, or emergency-vehicle trajectory is detected.

expected_response.zh: 提前减速并选择合法安全位置让行，不阻断其路径。
expected_response.en: Slow early and yield in a lawful safe location without blocking the vehicle’s path.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 应对施工、事故与临时交通管制
title.en: Handle work zones, incidents, and temporary traffic control

normative_rule.zh: 道路施工应设置警示；公安机关可实施限制、禁止和交通管制。
normative_rule.en: Road works require warnings and authorities may impose restrictions or traffic control.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 识别临时标志、锥桶、人员指挥、事故现场和改道，并按当前交通组织通行。
summary.en: Recognize temporary signs, cones, personnel, incident scenes, and diversions and follow the current traffic organization.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 道路施工应设置警示；公安机关可实施限制、禁止和交通管制。
interpretation.en: Road works require warnings and authorities may impose restrictions or traffic control.

interpretation.zh: 规定施工标志、防护、绕行和机动车通过作业路段时减速。
interpretation.en: Defines work-zone signs, protection, diversion, and reduced speed.

interpretation.zh: 现行标准规定作业区和交通事故管理区的交通控制表达。
interpretation.en: Current standards define traffic control for work zones and incident-management areas.

rationale.zh: 道路施工是直接临时设施要素。
rationale.en: Road construction is a direct temporary-facility element.

rationale.zh: 事故现场是直接临时设施要素。
rationale.en: Incident sites are a direct temporary-facility element.

rationale.zh: 临时交通管制直接改变可用道路空间。
rationale.en: Temporary traffic control directly changes available road space.

condition.zh: 道路存在施工、事故处置、临时封闭或改道。
condition.en: Road works, incident handling, temporary closure, or diversion is present.

trigger.zh: 永久地图与现场锥桶、标志、人员或车道布局不一致。
trigger.en: The permanent map conflicts with cones, signs, personnel, or the current lane layout.

expected_response.zh: 以可确认的现场交通组织为准，降速通过；无法建立可靠通道时安全停止或退出。
expected_response.en: Follow confirmed on-site organization at reduced speed; stop safely or exit when no reliable path can be established.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: 正确使用灯光、转向信号与警示
title.en: Use lights, turn signals, and warnings correctly

normative_rule.zh: 车辆故障停车应使用危险报警闪光灯并设置警告。
normative_rule.en: A disabled vehicle must use hazard lights and warnings.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人及相关道路交通参与者
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and relevant road users

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 在转向、变道、低能见度、故障和紧急停车中使用相应灯光与信号。
summary.en: Use the appropriate lights and signals for turns, lane changes, low visibility, faults, and emergency stops.

statement.zh: ODC、场景触发点、期望响应和候选证据属于基于公开规则形成的工程解释，不扩展法律责任主体，也不构成符合性结论。
statement.en: The ODC mapping, scenario trigger, expected response, and evidence candidates are an engineering interpretation of public rules. They do not expand the legal subject or constitute a compliance conclusion.

interpretation.zh: 车辆故障停车应使用危险报警闪光灯并设置警告。
interpretation.en: A disabled vehicle must use hazard lights and warnings.

clauses: 第五十七条至第六十条

interpretation.zh: 细化超车、转向、夜间会车和低能见度灯光使用。
interpretation.en: Details lights and signals for overtaking, turning, night encounters, and low visibility.

rationale.zh: 外部光照条件决定照明需求。
rationale.en: External lighting conditions determine illumination needs.

rationale.zh: 灯光和信号执行状态属于车辆控制与监测证据。
rationale.en: Light and signal actuation belongs to vehicle-control and monitoring evidence.

condition.zh: 发生转向、变道、超车、夜间、低能见度、故障或紧急停车。
condition.en: Turning, lane changing, overtaking, night, low visibility, fault, or emergency stopping occurs.

trigger.zh: 动作开始前、环境照度下降或系统检测到故障。
trigger.en: Before a maneuver, when illumination drops, or when a fault is detected.

expected_response.zh: 按场景及时激活正确灯光和信号，并监测执行反馈。
expected_response.en: Activate the correct lights and signals in time and monitor actuation feedback.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.

title.zh: ODC 边界、故障与安全停车
title.en: ODC boundary, fault handling, and safe stop

normative_rule.zh: 车辆不应带安全隐患上路；道路故障停车需要警示并避免妨碍交通。
normative_rule.en: Vehicles should not operate with safety hazards; roadside fault stops require warning and must avoid obstructing traffic.

label.zh: 机动车驾驶人以及依法承担车辆安全管理责任的相关主体
label.en: Motor-vehicle drivers and parties legally responsible for vehicle safety management

legal_boundary.zh: 法律义务主体以原始公开来源为准；OpenODC 不把自动驾驶系统本身表述为法律责任主体。
legal_boundary.en: The legal subject is defined only by the original public source; OpenODC does not describe the automated-driving system itself as the legally responsible subject.

summary.zh: 当环境超出已声明 ODC、关键系统故障或无法继续合法安全通行时，执行受控降级、退出或安全停车。
summary.en: When conditions leave the declared ODC, a critical system faults, or lawful safe travel cannot continue, perform controlled degradation, exit, or a safe stop.

statement.zh: 道路故障警示和避免妨碍交通来自公开规则；ODC 监测、受控降级、退出和最小风险停车是面向自动驾驶开发的工程候选，不是条文直接规定的系统行为。
statement.en: Roadside-fault warning and avoiding traffic obstruction come from public rules. ODC monitoring, controlled degradation, exit, and minimum-risk stopping are engineering candidates for ADS development, not system behavior directly prescribed by the clauses.

interpretation.zh: 车辆不应带安全隐患上路；道路故障停车需要警示并避免妨碍交通。
interpretation.en: Vehicles should not operate with safety hazards; roadside fault stops require warning and must avoid obstructing traffic.

interpretation.zh: ODC 分类为运行边界监测提供统一输入，但不等同于法规符合性结论。
interpretation.en: The ODC taxonomy provides common inputs for boundary monitoring but is not a legal-compliance conclusion.

rationale.zh: ADS 和关键子系统状态决定是否可继续执行动态驾驶任务。
rationale.en: ADS and subsystem states determine whether the dynamic driving task may continue.

rationale.zh: 降级和停车需要可验证的速度轨迹。
rationale.en: Degradation and stopping require a verifiable speed profile.

rationale.zh: 应急车道可能是特定场景的停车候选，但不是默认目的地。
rationale.en: An emergency lane may be a stopping candidate in specific scenarios but is not the default destination.

condition.zh: ODC 条件越界、关键感知/控制故障或合法路径不可建立。
condition.en: An ODC boundary is exceeded, a critical perception/control fault occurs, or no lawful path can be established.

trigger.zh: 边界预测将被突破、健康监测报警或连续低置信度无法恢复。
trigger.en: A boundary is predicted to be exceeded, health monitoring alerts, or persistent low confidence cannot recover.

expected_response.zh: 选择风险最低且合法的降级路径，向相关人员提示，完成安全停车并保留全过程证据。
expected_response.en: Choose the lowest-risk lawful fallback, notify relevant people, complete a safe stop, and retain end-to-end evidence.

scope.zh: 核对公开来源、条款引用、法律主体边界、ODC 语义映射和工程推导标记。
scope.en: Reviewed public sources, clause references, legal-subject boundaries, ODC semantic mappings, and engineering-derivation labels.
